title: [ARCHIVED] Trident Shards
description: Literally just adds trident shards, dropped from Elder Guardians, used to craft tridents.
body:
Literally just adds trident shards. You need 3 to craft a trident, and each slain Elder Guardian drops 1.

Simply place a prismarine shard in the bottom-left and middle, with trident shards in the remaining 3 top-right crafting table slots. Note that you will unlock the recipe in your recipe book automatically upon collecting your first trident shard.

The trident shard texture used is from [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd)
